name: CRM
description: Customer relationship management — manage contacts and deals across workspaces.
author: Plexica

declaredTables.name: crm_contacts
declaredTables.content:
CREATE TABLE crm_contacts (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  workspace_id UUID NOT NULL,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  email TEXT,
  phone TEXT,
  company TEXT,
  notes TEXT,
  created_by UUID,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contacts_workspace_id ON crm_contacts(workspace_id);

CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contacts_name ON crm_contacts(name);

declaredTables.name: crm_deals
crm_processed_events
